text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lunch break is coming to an end, yet Rice Shower
is still at the plaza...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing like that... We're playing hide and
seek, but I just haven't found her yet.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to just throw in the towel... but then what's
the point in playing?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And if I do that, Urara won't play with me
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So I have to find her before the bell rings at the
end of lunch... No matter what!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Persistent in her search, Rice Shower is able to
find Haru Urara, but not without tiring herself
out.
